rationale.rules-based-checks: presents VibeGuard, a static-analysis pre-publish scanner for build artifacts
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: analyzes operational vulnerabilities in vibe-coding like the Claude Code leak
rationale.framework: proposes a modular security gate architecture for build pipelines
rationale.built-system: implemented VibeGuard and tested it on synthetic projects
rationale.problem-statement-anchor: cites the staggering 512k-line Claude Code source leak incident
